item.title: Presidential Nominations Sent to the Senate for Confirmation
item.description: A notification of multiple presidential nominations sent to the Senate for confirmation and advice. The nominations include David Brat of Virginia for Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary to Australia, Hal Duncan of Texas for Deputy Director of the Office of Management and Budget, and Sean Kaufman of Georgia for Assistant Secretary for Preparedness and Response at the Department of Health and Human Services, among other positions requiring Senate confirmation. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Nominations Sent to Senate for Various Federal Positions
item.description: The President submitted nominations to the Senate for multiple federal appointments including Riley Barnes of Texas for Director of the Peace Corps, Rudolph Bauer of South Carolina for Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary to Belize, and Don Richard Berthiaume Jr. of Virginia for Inspector General of the Department of Justice, among other positions requiring Senate confirmation. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Limited Partnership to Operate and Maintain Pipeline Facilities at the United States-Canada Border in North Dakota
item.description: This presidential permit grants Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership authorization to operate and maintain three existing pipeline facilities located at Pembina County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit is issued under the authority vested in the President of the United States and is subject to specified conditions set forth in the document. Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership is a limited partnership organized under Delaware law. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.
